title: pyrrosia bonii
intro: Pyrrosia bonii, a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, is a type of tropical fern native to Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Pyrrosia bonii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
